prose:
Property: HOMO energy (eV).
Level of theory: GFN2-xTB (semi-empirical tight-binding), no Gaussian basis.
Geometry provenance: user-supplied ammonia.xyz; fixed geometry, single-point orbital analysis (no re-optimization).
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent).
Charge & multiplicity: 0, 1 (closed-shell).
Backend software: xtb 6.6 via chemkit visualize-orbitals skill.
Convergence: SCF converged; no engine warnings.
Result: HOMO = –10.615709 eV (LUMO = +1.6650058 eV; 7 orbitals total).
Files & reproducibility: live log and molden file at /Users/evane/Desktop/Research/Argonne/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/visualize-orbitals-validation/ammonia/20260624-114151_ammonia_visualize_orbitals/agent_call_01_molden.molden.
Method summary: visualize-orbitals run with `--method xtb` (GFN2-xTB) on the supplied ammonia geometry; result computed, not experimental.
